---
title: "Connecting Public Diplomacy and Foreign Policy"
date: 2018-09
author:
  - name: Kadir Jun Ayhan
    url: https://kjayhan.github.io
    orcid: 0000-0001-8052-1938
    affiliation: Ewha Womans University Graduate School of International Studies
categories: [public diplomacy, foreign policy, international relations, diplomacy, 2018]
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Kadir Jun Ayhan*</strong> (2018), "Connecting Public Diplomacy and Foreign Policy," <em>International Studies Review</em>: 22(4): 988-989, doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1093/isr/viy041"><code>10.1093/isr/viy041</code></a>
doi: 10.1093/isr/viy041
#image:
#draft: true
---

## Book review

Sevin Efe. [Public Diplomacy and the Implementation of Foreign Policy in the US, Sweden and Turkey](https://link.springer.com/book/10.1007/978-3-319-49334-3). Cham, Switzerland: Palgrave Macmillan, 2017. 248 pp., 114.39€ hardcover (ISBN: 978-3-319-49333-6).

## BibTeX citation

``` bibtex
@article{ayhan_connecting_2018,
    title = {Connecting {Public} {Diplomacy} and {Foreign} {Policy}},
    volume = {20},
    issn = {1521-9488},
    number = {3},
    journal = {International Studies Review},
    author = {Ayhan, Kadir Jun},
    year = {2018},
    note = {Type: Book review},
    pages = {539--540},
}
```
